name: Caramel Apple Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix and press the graham crackers, melted butter, chopped pecans, and sugar into the bottom and sides of a 10-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 350 degrees for 10 minutes. Remove the crust from the oven and place a pan of water in the bottom of the oven.
CAKE
32 oz CREAM CHEESE, unwrapped and warmed in Microwave 2 minutes.
1 1/4 c SUGAR
1/4 cup CORNSTARCH
5 JUMBO EGGS, out of shell and warmed in Microwave 25 seconds.
1 cup SOUR CREAM
1 cup APPLE, chopped and peeled
1 1/2 ts APPLE PIE SPICE (or 1 tsp cinnamon and 1/2 tsp nutmeg)
1/2 cup CARAMEL TOPPING (such as ice cream)
3. Assemble the cheesecake layers in the springform pan.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour or until set.
5. Cool completely before removing from the oven and refrigerating.
